rulings.Case Title: AMERICAN RECOVERY SERVICE INCORPORATED,A CORPORATI VS. THEODORE J MARR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 2, 2007, LINE 1. CROSS-COMPLAINANT THEODORE MARR'S Motion For Relief From Default. THE MOTION IS DENIED. THE MANDATORY PROVISIONS OF CCP 473(b) ONLY APPLY TO DEFAULT JUDGMENTS. THE COURT APPEARS TO HAVE CONSIDERED THE MOTION TO QUASH ON THE MERITS AND IF MARR DESIRED TO BRING FURTHER FACTS TO THE COURT'S ATTENTION, THE APPROPRIATE PROCEDURE WAS TO FILE A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION WITHIN TEN DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER, CCP 1008. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: SA-RO LEASING INC. VS. JAMES RANKIN SR. et al

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF WILLIAM SYKES VS. THOMASHA MAYFIELD et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 2, 2007, LINE 3. PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF WILLIAM SYKES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FAIL TO COMPLY WITH CCP 437(b)(1) AND RULE OF COURT 3.1350(d) IN THAT PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SET FORTH THE ELEMENTS OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AND THE UNDISPUTED FACTS RELATED THERETO. THE MOTION FAILS TO NEGATE THE EFFECT OF THE DEED CHANGING TITLE TO COMMUNITY PROPERTY, THOMASHA MAYFIELD'S PAYMENTS OF TAXES AND OCCUPANCY OF THE PREMISES FOR SIX YEARS, OR THE NOTARY'S RIGHT TO RELY UPON A VALID CALIFORNIA DRIVER'S LICENSE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE COMPLIANCE WITH THE RENT ORDINANCE IN SEEKING TO RECOVER RENT. THE OBJECTIONS OF THOMASHA MAYFIELD AND FREMONT FOR LACK OF AUTHENTICATION OF DOCUMENTS AND THE FIFTH AMENDMENT ARE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO DEWITT DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF WILLIAM SYKES VS. THOMASHA MAYFIELD et al

rulings.Case Title: CHARAN S SIJHER VS. JAGTAR KANDOLA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 2, 2007, LINE 11. PLAINTIFF CHARAN SIJHER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE THE MOTION FAILS TO ADDRESS EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF HAS OR CAN RESTORE TO DEFENDANT EVERYTHING OF VALUE THAT PLAINTIFF RECEIVED(CCP 1691(b)). =(302/PJM)
